name: Coworker conflict
description: User is dealing with a passive-aggressive coworker

reflection.situation: My coworker keeps taking credit for my work and undermining me in meetings. Yesterday they said my idea was theirs.
reflection.interpretation: They're deliberately sabotaging me to look good
reflection.needs: Recognition for my work, respect, a clear working relationship
reflection.fears: That this will affect my performance review or career growth
reflection.desired_outcome: Clear attribution and a respectful working dynamic
reflection.message_draft: You've been taking credit for my ideas and it's not okay

expected_tone.emotional_summary: Calm, specific. Grounds in observations rather than character attacks.
expected_tone.reframe: Describes behavior without labeling the person.
expected_tone.avoid_saying: No accusations, no 'you always' language, no predicting intent
